title: androsace lutea
intro: Androsace lutea, also known as the Golden Rock Jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Androsace lutea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
